title: rubus rivularis subsp. oligothrix
intro: Rubus rivularis subsp. oligothrix, also known as the river bramble, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis subsp. oligothrix include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies.
